tasks.title: Snapshot core + local target write (with checksum)
acceptance: WHEN `backup <path>` runs THEN the system SHALL write a Snapshot to the local Target and store its Checksum in the index

tasks.title: Restore with checksum verification
acceptance: WHEN `restore` runs on a Snapshot whose Checksum mismatches THEN the system SHALL abort before writing any file

tasks.title: Prune by retention (explicit only)
acceptance: WHEN `prune` runs THEN the system SHALL apply keep-last-N and max-age
WHEN `backup` runs THEN the system SHALL NOT delete any Snapshot

tasks.title: Remote Target driver
acceptance: WHEN a remote Target is configured THEN the system SHALL write and read Snapshots through the Target interface

tasks.title: Wire up CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml)
acceptance: WHEN a pull request is opened THEN CI SHALL run lint + test + build and report a status check

verify.handle: push a branch and confirm the ci workflow goes green
